title: Stir Fried Yogurt Delight
description: A unique dessert combining the creamy texture of yogurt with the crunch of a sweet stir-fry. A perfect treat for those with a sweet tooth.
instructions: Combine the Greek yogurt and honey in a bowl.
Add the vanilla extract and mix well.
In a separate pan, heat the stir-fry until lightly toasted.
Fold the toasted stir-fry into the yogurt mixture.
Add the sweet ingredients and fold until evenly distributed.
Transfer the mixture to individual serving cups.
Chill in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes.
Serve chilled and garnish with additional sweet ingredients if desired.
